A quick web-search in your favorite engine will show that Docker is a technology that has increased in popularity and adoption between tech companies. This is due to the flexibility and ease of use making it a must have in every developer tool-belt.

In this article, I’ll show a simple way to start a React Application and dockerize it - utilizing docker and docker-compose. To complete the steps provided in this tutorial, you’ll need the following tools installed in your computer:
